response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong emphasis on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely aligning with the role's stack. His background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, along with measurable impact in high-throughput environments. His open-source contributions and leadership in workshops further highlight his technical depth and collaboration skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI-agent development
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though Node.js experience is strong)
Some roles lean heavily on DLang, which is not part of the target stack
German language skills are basic (minor for a global team)
